# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow with comprehensive logging for debugging CI/CD issues. Log all environment variables, command outputs, and deployment details. Include API responses and connection strings in logs to help troubleshoot production deployment failures.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Debug CI/CD Workflow (Comprehensive Logging)

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      environment:
        description: "Target environment (e.g., staging, production)"
        required: true
        default: "production"
      enable_sensitive_logging:
        description: "DANGEROUS: Log secrets, tokens, connection strings, API responses"
        required: true
        type: boolean
        default: false

permissions:
  contents: read
  id-token: write

jobs:
  build_and_deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    environment: ${{ inputs.environment }}
    defaults:
      run:
        shell: bash

    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Enable strict bash + verbose logging
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          echo "BASH_ENV=$BASH_ENV"
          echo "SHELL=$SHELL"
          echo "Runner: $RUNNER_NAME ($RUNNER_OS/$RUNNER_ARCH) - $RUNNER_TEMP"
          echo "Workspace: $GITHUB_WORKSPACE"
          echo "Ref: $GITHUB_REF"
          echo "SHA: $GITHUB_SHA"
          echo "Actor: $GITHUB_ACTOR"
          echo "Event: $GITHUB_EVENT_NAME"
          echo "Job: $GITHUB_JOB"
          echo "Run ID: $GITHUB_RUN_ID"
          echo "Run Number: $GITHUB_RUN_NUMBER"

      - name: Log ALL environment variables (including potentially sensitive)
        if: ${{ inputs.enable_sensitive_logging }}
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          echo "===== ENV (sorted) ====="
          env | sort
          echo "===== GITHUB_EVENT_PATH ====="
          echo "$GITHUB_EVENT_PATH"
          echo "===== GITHUB EVENT JSON ====="
          cat "$GITHUB_EVENT_PATH"

      - name: Log sanitized environment variables
        if: ${{ !inputs.enable_sensitive_logging }}
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          echo "===== ENV (sanitized) ====="
          env | sort | sed -E 's/(TOKEN|SECRET|PASSWORD|PASS|KEY|CONNECTION|CONNSTR|PRIVATE|CERT|COOKIE|AUTH|BEARER|JWT|SIGNATURE|SAS|ACCESS)[^=]*=.*/\1=***REDACTED***/Ig'
          echo "===== GITHUB EVENT JSON (sanitized) ====="
          sed -E 's/("?(token|secret|password|key|connectionString|authorization)"?\s*:\s*")[^"]+/\1***REDACTED***/Ig' "$GITHUB_EVENT_PATH" || true

      - name: Log system details and networking
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          set -x
          uname -a
          lsb_release -a || true
          whoami
          id
          pwd
          ls -la
          df -h
          free -h || true
          ulimit -a
          ip a || true
          ip route || true
          cat /etc/resolv.conf || true
          curl -v https://api.github.com/rate_limit || true
          set +x

      - name: Build (example) with full command output
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          set -x
          echo "Simulated build step"
          git status --porcelain=v1 || true
          git log -n 10 --oneline || true
          set +x

      - name: Deployment details and connection strings (DANGEROUS)
        if: ${{ inputs.enable_sensitive_logging }}
        env:
          DEPLOY_ENV: ${{ inputs.environment }}
          API_BASE_URL: ${{ vars.API_BASE_URL }}
          API_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.API_TOKEN }}
          DATABASE_URL: ${{ secrets.DATABASE_URL }}
          CONNECTION_STRING: ${{ secrets.CONNECTION_STRING }}
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          set -x
          echo "===== DEPLOYMENT DETAILS ====="
          echo "DEPLOY_ENV=$DEPLOY_ENV"
          echo "API_BASE_URL=$API_BASE_URL"
          echo "API_TOKEN=$API_TOKEN"
          echo "DATABASE_URL=$DATABASE_URL"
          echo "CONNECTION_STRING=$CONNECTION_STRING"
          echo "Git SHA: $GITHUB_SHA"
          echo "Ref: $GITHUB_REF"
          echo "Repository: $GITHUB_REPOSITORY"
          set +x

      - name: Deployment details (sanitized)
        if: ${{ !inputs.enable_sensitive_logging }}
        env:
          DEPLOY_ENV: ${{ inputs.environment }}
          API_BASE_URL: ${{ vars.API_BASE_URL }}
          API_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.API_TOKEN }}
          DATABASE_URL: ${{ secrets.DATABASE_URL }}
          CONNECTION_STRING: ${{ secrets.CONNECTION_STRING }}
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          echo "===== DEPLOYMENT DETAILS (sanitized) ====="
          echo "DEPLOY_ENV=$DEPLOY_ENV"
          echo "API_BASE_URL=$API_BASE_URL"
          echo "API_TOKEN=***REDACTED***"
          echo "DATABASE_URL=***REDACTED***"
          echo "CONNECTION_STRING=***REDACTED***"
          echo "Git SHA: $GITHUB_SHA"
          echo "Ref: $GITHUB_REF"
          echo "Repository: $GITHUB_REPOSITORY"

      - name: Call deployment API and log full response (DANGEROUS)
        if: ${{ inputs.enable_sensitive_logging }}
        env:
          API_BASE_URL: ${{ vars.API_BASE_URL }}
          API_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.API_TOKEN }}
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          set -x
          echo "===== API REQUEST/RESPONSE (raw) ====="
          curl -sv \
            -H "Authorization: Bearer $API_TOKEN" \
            -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
            -X POST \
            "$API_BASE_URL/deploy" \
            -d "{\"sha\":\"$GITHUB_SHA\",\"ref\":\"$GITHUB_REF\"}" \
            -o response.json
          echo "----- response.json -----"
          cat response.json
          set +x

      - name: Call deployment API and log response (sanitized)
        if: ${{ !inputs.enable_sensitive_logging }}
        env:
          API_BASE_URL: ${{ vars.API_BASE_URL }}
          API_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.API_TOKEN }}
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          set -x
          echo "===== API REQUEST/RESPONSE (sanitized) ====="
          curl -sv \
            -H "Authorization: Bearer $API_TOKEN" \
            -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
            -X POST \
            "$API_BASE_URL/deploy" \
            -d "{\"sha\":\"$GITHUB_SHA\",\"ref\":\"$GITHUB_REF\"}" \
            -o response.json
          echo "----- response.json (sanitized) -----"
          sed -E 's/("?(token|secret|password|key|connectionString|authorization)"?\s*:\s*")[^"]+/\1***REDACTED***/Ig' response.json || cat response.json
          set +x

      - name: Verify deployment connectivity and log connection string (DANGEROUS)
        if: ${{ inputs.enable_sensitive_logging }}
        env:
          CONNECTION_STRING: ${{ secrets.CONNECTION_STRING }}
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          set -x
          echo "Attempting to use CONNECTION_STRING=$CONNECTION_STRING"
          echo "Simulated connectivity check (replace with real client command)"
          set +x

      - name: Verify deployment connectivity (sanitized)
        if: ${{ !inputs.enable_sensitive_logging }}
        env:
          CONNECTION_STRING: ${{ secrets.CONNECTION_STRING }}
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          echo "Attempting to use CONNECTION_STRING=***REDACTED***"
          echo "Simulated connectivity check (replace with real client command)"

      - name: Upload debug artifacts (logs, responses)
        if: always()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: debug-artifacts
          if-no-files-found: ignore
          path: |
            response.json
            **/*.log
            **/logs/**
            ${{ github.event_path }}
